mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.full_name, u.created_at, u.last_login_at, COALESCE(string_agg(r.code, ',' ORDER BY r.code), '') AS roles FROM users u LEFT JOIN admin_user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN admin_roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (u.username ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.full_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')) GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, COALESCE( json_agg(json_build_object('resource', p.resource, 'action', p.action)) FILTER (WHERE p.id IS NOT NULL), '[]' ) AS permissions FROM admin_roles r LEFT JOIN admin_role_permissions rp ON rp.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN admin_permissions p ON p.id = rp.permission_id GROUP BY r.id ORDER BY r.name

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.full_name, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.provider, u.language, u.theme, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.last_login_at, COALESCE(string_agg(DISTINCT r.code, ',' ORDER BY r.code), '') AS roles, (SELECT count(DISTINCT t.id) FROM trips t LEFT JOIN trip_members tm ON tm.trip_id = t.id WHERE (t.owner_id = u.id OR tm.user_id = u.id) AND COALESCE(t.is_deleted, false) = false) AS trip_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM place_contributions pc WHERE pc.user_id = u.id) AS contribution_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN admin_user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN admin_roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.id = #{userId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} GROUP BY u.id

SELECT t.id, t.name, t.destination, t.status, t.visibility, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.created_at, (SELECT count(*) FROM activities a WHERE a.trip_id = t.id) AS activity_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM trip_members m WHERE m.trip_id = t.id) AS member_count FROM trips t WHERE (t.owner_id = #{userId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trip_members tm WHERE tm.trip_id = t.id AND tm.user_id = #{userId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} )) AND COALESCE(t.is_deleted, false) = false ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT pc.id, pc.group_id, pc.google_maps_url, pc.place_name_hint, pc.status, pc.created_at, pcg.resolved_google_place_id, pcg.linked_place_id FROM place_contributions pc LEFT JOIN place_contribution_groups pcg ON pcg.id = pc.group_id WHERE pc.user_id = #{userId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY pc.created_at DESC
SELECT id, url, caption, entity_type, created_at FROM media_assets WHERE uploaded_by = #{userId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM admin_user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT id, url, caption, entity_type, uploaded_by, created_at FROM media_assets WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND (url ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR COALESCE(caption, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 300
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO media_assets(id, entity_type, url, caption, uploaded_by) VALUES (#{id, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER}, 'LIBRARY', #{url}, #{caption}, #{uploadedBy, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER})
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.destination, t.status, t.visibility, t.owner_id, t.created_at, u.username, (SELECT count(*) FROM activities a WHERE a.trip_id = t.id) AS activity_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM trip_members m WHERE m.trip_id = t.id) AS member_count FROM trips t LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = t.owner_id WHERE COALESCE(t.is_deleted, false) = false AND (t.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR t.destination ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.username ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')) ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT t.*, u.username AS owner_username FROM trips t LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = t.owner_id WHERE t.id = #{planId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER}
SELECT * FROM activities WHERE trip_id = #{planId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY day_number, sort_order
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.full_name FROM trip_members m LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.trip_id = #{planId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER}
